name: Square Floral Pillow - Threshold™
description:
Bring springtime charm to your living space with this Square Floral Throw Pillow from Threshold™. This decorative throw pillow is made from cotton-linen blend fabric with polyester filling to offer cushioned comfort on any bed, sofa or armchair. Featuring vibrant floral print, it also has striped flange for added visual interest.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
